title: KA HI BANG HONG LA IN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa Jesuh ka thungai in
Na hong phel kei leh ka si ding
Kiphel na thu hong pia suk
in
Ka hi bang hong la in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka hi bang hong la in
Ka hi bang hong la
in
Nang ma sih kei ma phatna hi
Ka hi bang hong la in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Phelna mu lo mawhna
tampi
Ka neih manin Topa a si
Nong hehpih leh Nong phel thei hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bang mah a pha
ka bawl zolo
Ka thu ciamna ka siasak zo
Na min tawh hong phel sak in aw
Ka hi bang hong la
in

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na khe mai ah kong kun Topa
Nong muh bangin kei ka hi hi
Nasep kipan kiman
khin zo
Ka hi bang hong la in
